series_metadata.series_description: The easement file contains the approved application, subordination agreement (if applicable), appraisal for easements (if applicable), title insurance commitment and policy, and a copy of the deed. The original recorded deed is sent to the Legal Department of the Auditor of State and then to State Archives for storage.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Permanent or scanned. Deeds be transferred State Archives. ; Electronic: Permanent
